creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey!

Why do you think it doesn't clean the ruby18 dir properly?
It surely does for me, as ruby18 dependency is lister properly.
In any case, this is not the correct place to fix it - if it really
doesn't work it should be fixed in bsd.port.mk, not as a hack in the
port itself.

-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
